compositional_truth_check.P1_Yellow_Pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.P2_Black_Pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.P3_Black_Pot: Systemic Loss: The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent/shriveled beyond recognition.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: All registered specimens are currently absent or non-viable. The biome is currently a collection of empty, soil-filled containers.

plant_audit.P3: Empty soil surface with white rabbit figurine.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no signs of fungal bloom or crusting.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no debris or secondary growth observed.
biome_observations.anomalies: The presence of a white rabbit figurine in P3 is the only non-soil element remaining.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: The sequence shows a static, unchanging state of barren soil. No growth, no decay, and no movement occurred over the 5-day period.

visual_health_inference.conclusion: The biome is currently non-functional. All plants have suffered total systemic loss prior to the start of this observation window.

anomalies: Total absence of biological plant matter despite registry expectations.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms that the botanical registry does not match the physical reality of the desk. The pots contain only soil and a single decorative figurine. There is no evidence of the String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Pothos, or Silver Guest. The environment appears to have been cleared or the specimens have perished entirely before the first image in this sequence was captured.
